rationale: Both flag the diffusion loader (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py) still calling the removed get_cache_scale API, hitting the latent gap, but Y treats it as a grep-verified blocker with concrete file:line fix instructions and a matching test-file update, while X buries it as a 'non-blocking' note and asserts it was 'already addressed on main' with a specific '(see #4810)' comment citation that contradicts the gap check's premise that this required a later issue (#4891) — an unverifiable, likely fabricated detail that undercuts precision and defangs the finding's urgency. Y also better mirrors ground-truth substance (qwen2_old's guard removal as cleanup, not regression) and adds a well-grounded extra catch (mimo_audio_llm mapper-ordering fix) with consistently precise line-level evidence, giving it stronger recall and actionability overall.
